positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene. A central grouping of highly stylized, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, including abstract, geometric representations of trees and glowing mushrooms. The colors should be limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of ethereal gold. The composition must be symmetrical and centralized, forming a clean, strong silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Use a vibrant vaporwave aesthetic mixed with gothic botanical elements. Full moon visible in the deep background, creating high contrast and dramatic rim lighting on the edges of the flora. Print quality, vector art style, solid colors, highly detailed illustration, negative space composition.
